description.value:
Prerequisite: Treat Injury 8 ranks, Surgery.

Benefit: The character can make a Treat Injury check (DC 20) to install or remove a cybernetic attachment. Without a Surgery kit or medical facility, take a -4 penalty. Cybernetic surgery takes 1d4 hours. If the check fails by 5 or more, the patient suffers 1d4 Constitution damage. If the check fails by 10 or more, it is Constitution drain instead. A character who undergoes cybernetic surgery is fatigued for 24 hours, reduced by 2 hours per point above the DC (minimum 6 hours).
description.summary: The character can make a Treat Injury check (DC 20) to install or remove a cybernetic attachment. Without a Surgery…
